attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HEADERS)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.WEEE_FEE_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.ORG_ID, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.COUNTRY, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.WEEE_FEE_INV_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.WEEE_FEE_ITEM_NAME, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.WEEE_FEE_CURRENCY, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.SOLD_TO_ORG_ID, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.STATE_OR_PROVINCE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.WEEE_FEE_DESCRIPTION, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.START_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.END_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.ACCOUNT_NO, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.SUBACCOUNT, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS,
 (
 select WEEE_FEE_HEADER_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS
 minus
 select WEEE_FEE_HEADER_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HEADERS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.WEEE_FEE_HEADER_ID = STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.WEEE_FEE_HEADER_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_HDRS.REFRESH_DATETIME
